event_info: fuller length delivery on off; Salt leans across and inside edge halves it to muid-on
beaten; on a good length and shaping across the right-hander; Salt plays loosely and away from his body; beaten on the outside edge

clattered; fuller length delivery and pushed across the right-hander; Salt's feet hardly moved as he threw the bat on the drive; sliced it high and over backward point. The ball plugs in front of the ropes and it's pulled back; saving a run
on a good length anbd just outside off - Kohli plays with soft hands and drops it wide of cover; he set-off for a quick single and has to hurry back
a leading edge and Kohli has enough to clear Dube at mid-on. Pitched up and slanting across the right-hander; Kohli was early into the wristy flick; closed the face of the bat and the ball popped up
beaten; fuller length delivery and shaping away from wide of off; draws Kohli into a loose drive and the swing takes it past the shot
on a good length and just outside off - dabbed onto the off-side where the fielder fumbles and allows a single
short of a good length and angling across the right-hander; dabbed behind point where the fielder fumbles and allows a single
fuller length delivery outside off; Salt swipes across the line; gets a thick edge and the ball goes on the bounce to third man
nicely played; on a length and angling into the right-hander; Kohli lets the ball come and wristily flicks it over square leg. Noor runs to his left; slides and keeps them down to a couple
on a good length and just outside off - Kohli charges dowan the pitch and mistimes the drive; to the left of mid-on for a run
fuller length delivery outside off - drilled hard and straight to the fielder at mid-off
short of a good length and just outside off - Kohli swivels across and drags it towards mid-wicket; off for a quick single
a thick edge; but the ball flies wide of backward point. On a length and pushed across the right-hander - Salt went hard and the bottom-hand came off on impact

a chance and Dube has let-off Virat Kohli; went very high and over mid-on; Dube seemed to have it covered as he ran back from mid-on; got to the ball and it then popped out of his grasp. On a good length and pushed across the right-hander; Kohli swung and got it right off the bottom of the bat
1 run; fuller length delivery and on the pads; Kohli was shaping to whip and missed; off the pad and rolled to the on-side
tad fuller and angling across the right-hander - Salt goes hard on the cross-batted swipe and mistimed it in front of mid-off; scrambles across for a quick single
fuller length delivery and angling across the right-hander - Kohli swings across the line and misses; bounces through to the keeper

another mistimed slog and the ball once again plugs in front of the ropes - fuller length delivery on off and Salt got under the length; a lot of height and not the distance. Bounces and stops in front of the rope and they get only a single
crunched; that should get Kohli going - on a length and just outside off; a flick of the wrists and Kohli shovels it high over mid-wicket; went a long way into the stands
tad fuller and just outside off - Kohli gets under it and then lifts it back over the bowler's head; over mid-off and the ball plgs in front of the boundary once again
Henry drags the length back as Kohli came down the pitch - he isn't in a great position on the pull; muscles it over mid-wicket and comes back for the second
cracking shot; tad too full from Henry - Kohli runs down the pitch; gets to the half-volley and drills it back past the bowler; to the right of mid-off and the ball sped away
on a good length and at the stumps; nudged with soft hands past mid-wicket; 16 off the over

where was Philip Salt running? A direct hit at the bowler's end and he might've been short - Kohli came down the pitch and drilled one straight to the fielder at mid-off. Philip Salt was backing up and is sent back
lovely; fraction too full and at the stumps; Kohli brings his wrists into play and then whips it over mid-wicket; couple of bounces and over the ropes

ball_event: out Caught by Shivam Dube!! A second chance for Dube and he doesn't miss out this time around. Excellent bowling from Kamboj
event_info: saw Kohli coming down the pitch and went with the hard length; banged into the pitch and gets that extra bounce. Kohli isn't in a great position on the pull; hit high on the bat and lobbed up towards long-on - mid-on ran back; but that was always Dube's catch. He settled under; keeps his eyes on the ball and completes the catch. Virat Kohli c Shivam Dube b Anshul Kamboj 28(18) [4s-2 6s-1]
on a good length and just outside off - Padikkal toe-ends the push to the off-side and he's off the mark for a single
edged and four; this has been a shaky start from Salt - short of a good length and just outside off; Salt backs away and has a poke; finds the edge and the ball flew past the keeper for a boundary
short of a good length and just outside off - Salt goes hard on the cut and mistimes it in front of cover for a single
slower ball on the pads; Salt swings and gets an inside edge; the ball rolls behind square on the on-side and he's back for the second
short of a good length and just outside off - slapped off the back-foot to cover
on a good length and just outside off; another msitimed drive towards mid-on for a single
fuller length delivery outside off and Devdutt's eyes lit up; went hard on the drive and is beaten on the outside edge
short of a good length and well wide of off; chopped square on the off-side for a single
thumped; back of a length and angling across the right-hander - Salt picks the length early; swivels across and then hammers the pull wide of mid-on
on a good length and just outside off - Devdutt walks forward and then drives it square past point; they think about a second and decide against it
banged in short by Kamboj; but it sails over Salt's head and is called as a wide
short of a good length and just outside off - slapped off the back-foot to cover
lovely; short of a good length and angling into the right-hander - Salt swivels across; gets inside the line and then pulls it over backward square leg; sails over the ropes for a maximum
a misfield and it costs them an extra run - Ramakrishna Ghosh; the substitute - was punched in front of cover and he took his eyes off the ball at the last moment
cracking shot; tad too short from Kamboj - Salt picks the length early; swivels across and the pulls it over mid-wicket. Was the slower ball; but the execution went wrong
short of a good length and just outside off; jabbed in front of cover for a quick single
very full and at the pads; Salt swipes across the line and then looses his footing; the ball drops besides the keeper
pushed through outside off - Salt backed away on the cut and mistimes it to the off-side
flighted on off; Padikkal goes back and works it to long-on for a single
beautifully played; tossed up just outside off; looked like the attempted wrong 'un; but it's too full and allows Salt to get under the slog-sweep; high and over mid-wicket for a maximum
fraction short and just outside off - punched square on the off-side for a single
Noor drifts one on middle and leg; clipped backward of square on the on-side for a single
back of a length and on the pads; he got some extra bounce; Padikkal mistimes a pull to backward square leg
half stop by the fielder and they get a couple; it was full and in the slot; Salt creams it wide of mid-off fielder; who dives to his left; but couldn't stop
short and outside off; Salt slaps it square of the wicket
he didn't time it; full and outside off; Padikkal was looking to go inside out; but skews it in the air to deep extra cover
this is cheeky; length on middle and leg; Padikkal had all the time in the world to moves across to the off side and clips it over the fielder to fine leg
full and outside off; Padikkal slices it away to sweeper cover; the partnership between Devdutt Padikkal and Phil Salt is now 50
full and outside off; Padikkal drives it straight to the fielder at cover and sets off for a single; but rightfully sent back
again fuller; Padikkal hits it straight to the fielder
this one was pushed through quicker; too close to cut; Padikkal goes for it and misses it completely
sliding into the pads; Padikkal whips it away to square leg
quicker and on middle; it hurried onto him; Salt stays back and whips it to mid-wicket
turning into the pads; Padikkal gets down to sweep; but didn't time it well and the ball goes off the edge to fine leg; the fielder chases it well and pulls it back just before the ropes
he starts off with a slower short delivery wide outside off; Salt was into the shot early and slaps it straight to the fielder at cover
Salt has missed out on that; low full toss outside leg side; Salt looks to flick; but gets an inside edge to short fine leg
length outside off; Padikkal taps it to the offside

ball_event: out Caught by Noor Ahmad!! That's a big wicket
event_info: another slower short ball; it sits up a bit; Salt went through the pull shot; but couldn't get the distance and Noor in the deep takes a comfortable catch. Was a big top-edge and Salt knew he was in trouble as soon as he played the shot. Dube has struck with a big wicket. Phil Salt c Noor Ahmad b Shivam Dube 46(30) [4s-3 6s-2]
this is good bowling; he is mixing the pace very well; Patidar works it to mid-wicket

DDP has found the gap this time; another attempted slower short delivery outside off; Padikkal gets on top of the ball nicely and cuts it over the fielder to third man; two fielders were up in the circle and he just had to hit over them

he 's just cleared the boundary; 100 up for RCB; it was full and in the slot; Patidar gets under the ball and lofts it square of the wicket; the fielder in the deep thought he had a chance; but it went just past him
tossed up on middle; Padikkal drives it to mid-off
this is massive hit! Tossed up on middle; Padikkal comes down the track and lofts it straight over the bowler's head to long-on; that was a monster
1 run; sliding on the pads; Padikkal misses out on the flick
full and on middle; Patidar eases it down to mid-off
slightly shorter and outside off; Padikkal rocks back and cuts it square of the wicket
mis-directed slower delivery wide outside off; Padikkal leaves it alone
on a length and angling across; Padikkal creames it to deep extra cover; he had timed it to perfection; but straight to the fielder

just over the head of the fielder; well directed slower short delivery; Patidar initially was surprised by the delivery; but went through with the shot and hits it just over the jumping fielder at backward square leg
angling in; Patidar works it to mid-wicket
into the grand stand; suddenly it's raining sixes at the Chinnaswamy; fuller and wide outside off; Padikkal walks towards the offside; gets under the ball and lofts it over cover
just past the outstretched hands of the point fielder; slower and outside off; Padikkal hangs back and just slices it past the fielder to deep backward point
this has been bludgeoned straight down the ground; Dube goes full this time; right in the slot; Padikkal clears his front leg and absolutely smashes it past the bowler
Sixes galore; full and right in the slot; Patidar doesn't miss on those; picks it and lofts it over long-off; the partnership between Rajat Patidar and Devdutt Padikkal is now 50
this one hurried onto him; Patidar pulls it away to deep mid-wicket
Ruturaj has dropped a difficult one at cover; this was crunched off the front foot to cover; the ball was travelling; Ruturaj moves to his right; but couldn't hold onto it

CSK have reviewed for the wide; the ball tracking shows it was above DDP; but the third umpire reverses the decision; it's a dot. Was well above the shoulder at 1.92m; but DDP's head height is measured at 1.93m and the on-field call has been reversed
crashed away; length and outside off; Padikkal reaches to the pitch of the ball and creams it to deep extra cover
another fifty for DDP; excellent innings so far as he shifted gears at the right time; on middle; Padikkal works it to mid-wicket

ball_event: out Bowled!! Too cheeky from DDP
event_info: unecessary shot; this one was speared full on the leg-stump; Padikkal tries to be cheeky; moves across to the off side to play the lap shot; misses his footing and the leg stump; needless shot and they were cruising along nicely. Devdutt Padikkal b Jamie Overton 50(29) [4s-5 6s-2]
full and sliding in; David flicks it straight to the fielder at midwicket
148ks; back of a length and once again some extra bounce and pace; too close to cut; David missed it completely
145ks; Overton is generating some good pace here; David pushes it back to the bowler
one bounce to the fielder in the deep; back of a length and outside off; David throws his bat at it and plays it in the air towards the sweeper cover; the fielder takes it on the bounce
1 run; terrific over from Overton; back of a length and angling in; this one hurried onto him as he was shaping in to pull; the ball rolls off the pads to the offside
back of a length and angling across; Patidar punches it in the air to deep extra cover
back of a length and angling across; David is not getting his timing right tonight; hits it straight to the fielder at deep square leg
slower short delivery outside off; Patidar missed it completely. Was measured at 1.87m while his head height was at 1.82m
he's picked it perfectly; low full-toss; Patidar doesn't miss out on those; gets under the ball nicely and lofts it over deep extra cover

excellent yorker on off; Patidar misses it completely; the ball hits him on the pad right in front of the off stump; but an under edge saved him. Was looking to swing across the line; was plumb in front if not for the minor scratch
slower off-cutter; but too much width; Patidar picked the change of pace quickly and cuts it over the fielder to third man
monster hit; slower delivery on middle; Patidar picks it early and launches it right into the stands over deep mid-wicket; RCB marching along nicely here
full and on middle; David drives it to cover
1 run; he's completely missed it; this one was slightly short; Patidar goes for the reverse sweep and missed it
that's brutal power of David; length and outside off; David picks it and absolutely muscles it to long-off; he didn't get the timing right; but it sailed over the fence
this one is a monster; flatter delivery on middle; David hangs back and smashes it to deep mid-wicket; this one went way into the stands; David starting to cut loose! 82M on that
another big hit; he switches to round the wicket; but bowls it on a length outside off; David throws his bat at it and lofts it over deep extra cover
40 off the last two overs; length outside off; David smashes it to deep extra cover; 21 runs off it
David is smashing everything now; low full-toss bowled wide outside off; David hangs back and slashes it past deep point; that raced away!
outside leg and angling across; David missed out on this; he goes for a wild swipe and misses it
another low full-toss; David creams it in the gap to deep extra cover; the fiedler covers good ground; slides well and saves two runs
full and outside off; David missed it completely

such a brilliant delivery; but it has turned into a disappointment; yorker delivery on the leg stump; David moves across to the off side and misses it as the leg stump goes for a walk; but Kamboj has overstepped!

another one has disappeared; length and outside off; David gets hold of it and hammers it over long-on. The partnership between Tim David and Rajat Patidar is past 50. It was a free hit `and he took full toll of it
full and outside off; David drives it down to long-off
he's in some mood today; he didn't start well as he was struggling with his timing; but now he is making amends; poor delivery on the pads; David whips it off his legs over backward square leg
full toss outside off; David goes across the line and gets an inside edge to fine leg
this one was banged in short outside off; it hurried onto him as David was shaping in to pull; the ball flies off the outside edge; over the keeper and bounces onto the ropes
fifty for David! He's been lucky; but he's connecting it beautifully here. Full and outside off; David picks it and hammers it over long-on
phenomenal batting from David. On a length; easy pickings for David as he launches it over the bowler's head straight down the ground
this one has landed in Cubbon park. On a shortish length from round the wicket; poor bowling; in the slot for David to launch it way over the stadium over deep square leg
this is carnage; full and in the slot; Patidar gets under the ball nicely and slices it to deep backward point; highest score of this season of IPL so far
low full-toss outside off; Patidar misses out on that and he's not happy with himself
full and just outside off; cramping him for room; Patidar carves it square of the wicket
great bowling; full and wide outside off; David slices it square of the wicket
good last over from Kamboj; he's giving nothing away and is just bowling full and wide outside off; Patidar slices it to deep point
Sarfaraz has made a mess of it; David smashes it in the air towards deep mid-wicket; Sarfaraz came running in; but he lost it because of the lights and RCB end with a boundary
short of a good length and angling into the hips; nudged backward of square on the on-side for a single
on a length and at the stumps; tucked behind square on the on-side for a single
tad fuller and just outside off; pushed to the right of mid-off for a single
cracking shot; fraction short and just outside off - Gaikwad picks the length early; swivels across and then hammers the pull over square leg for a maximum

ball_event: out Caught by Devdutt Padikkal!! Lovely bowling and Duffy has struck in the first over once again - superb bowling
event_info: pitched up and a hint of seam away from the right-hander; draws Gaikwad into a loose waft; plays well away from his body and the thick edge is snapped up with glee by DDP; moving to his right. Ruturaj Gaikwad c Devdutt Padikkal b Jacob Duffy 7(3) [6s-1]
short of a good length and well wide of off; steered backward of square on the off-side for a single
short of a good length and just outside off; Mhatre hops across defensively

ball_event: out Caught by Rajat Patidar!! 200th IPL wicket for Bhuvneshwar and he becomes the second bowler to do so. Hard length outside off
event_info: climbed onto the right-hander and Mhatre was in no position on the pull; badly cramped up; hit high on the bat and lobbed to mid-off where Patidar completed a dolly. Ayush Mhatre c Rajat Patidar b Bhuvneshwar Kumar 1(3)
lovely shot; width on offer and Sarfaraz throws his hands on the cut; gets on top of the bounce and clatters it past point for a boundary
Bhuvneshwar shortens the length outside off as Sarfaraz ran down the pitch; a swish and a miss
Bhuvneshwar shortens the length outside off - Sarfaraz plays with soft hands and defends it to the off-side
edged and four; back of a length and well wide of off - Sarfaraz went chasing after that; gets a thick edge; high and to DDP's left. He leapt and got a fingertip; but can only palm it away

uppish and safe; banged in short and kept climbing onto the right-hander - Samson wasn't in a great position on the pull; hit high on the bat - mid-on and mid-wicket ran back; but the ball landed in front of them

streaky and four; on a good length and straightening onto the right-hander - Sarfaraz was shaping to flick; closed the face of the bat and the edge lobbed over backward point - Bhuvneshwar got across from third man and is undone by the bounce off the practice pitches
1 run; on a good length and angling into the pads; Sarfaraz Khan was looking to flick and missed; off the pad and onto the on-side
nicely played; tad too short from Duffy - Samson picks the length early; swivels across and then uses the pace to pull it into the crowd at long leg

ball_event: out Caught by Devdutt Padikkal!! Duffy has his second and Sanju Samson has another failure in IPL 2026
event_info: his 3rd in a row. On a length and angling across the right-hander; Samson's feet went nowhere on the drive; gets a thick edge and DDP does the rest; holding onto a sharp chance at first slip. Sanju Samson c Devdutt Padikkal b Jacob Duffy 9(5) [6s-1]
on a length and at the stumps; Kartik Sharma prods across defensively
Bhuvneshwar shortens the length and just outside off; defended off the back-foot to the off-side
back of a length and well wide of off - Sarfaraz gets on top of the bounce and then hammers the pull over mid-on; bounces away to the ropes
on a good length and angling into the right-hander; Sarfaraz prods across and turns it to the on-side
short of a good length and just outside off; too close to play the dab and he's beaten on the outside edge
beautifully played; too full and too straight from Bhuvneshwar - Sarfaraz lets the ball come; brings his wrists into play and then whips it over deep backward square leg

1 run; appeal for LBW; but it look very high; short of a good length and angling back into the right-hander; struck high on the pad as he shaped to pull. There's a shy at the striker's end and the ball rolls behind square - Sarfaraz had dropped his bat; but they sneak in a run

fuller length delivery and angling down leg; Sarfaraz was looking to flick and missed. Called as a wide and RCB review; has it brushed the pad on its way. UltraEdge confirms it and the wide call has been reversed
thumped; short of a good length and just outside off - Sarfaraz gets on top of the bounce and then clatters the pull over wide mid-wicket
fuller length delivery and sliding down leg; called as a wide
short of a length and at the stumps - Sarfaraz picks the length early; swivels across and then pulls it over square leg for a boundary
aqppeal for LBW; but the angle was taking it down leg - very full and at the pads; Sarfaraz shuffled across on the flick and fell over on the shot

FOUR; whipped; Sarfaraz is playing a fine innings here - length ball at the stumps; he gets down low; brings his wrists into play and flicks it behind square on the on-side. One bounce and over the ropes - Duffy has overstepped as well; so a free-hit is coming up
full-toss outside off; Sarfaraz miscues the drive to the left of mid-on
nicely played; that should give him plenty of cdonfidence; leg-stump half-volley and he picks the flick; sends it very high and over the ropes at deep mid-wicket. 23 off the over
short of a good length and well wide of off; Sarfaraz throws his hands on the cut and loses his bat as well
short of a good length and well wide of off - Sarfaraz carves the cut over backward point; the ball slows down near the ropes and he's back for the second
lovely shot; a leg-stump half-volley and Sarfaraz whips it nonchalantly past square leg; races away to the ropes
he's playing a fine hand here; short of a good length and well wide of off - Sarfaraz reaches out and carves the drive over extra-cover for a boundary
back of a length and well wide of off - Sarfaraz picks the length and then clears mid-on with the pull; the ball plugs in front of the ropes and he's back for the second
short ball; pulled to deep mid-wicket and single brings up Sarfaraz Khan's fifty!

ball_event: out Stumped!! Krunal Pandya strikes first ball. 91.9kph
event_info: quick and flat on a length from round the wicket. Sarfaraz steps out of the crease to swing wildly across the line. Connects with thin air and Jitesh Sharma does the rest. Krunal removes the dangerous Sarfaraz who batted aggressively from the word go. Four down now. Sarfaraz Khan st Jitesh Sharma b Krunal Pandya 50(25) [4s-8 6s-2]
91kph; Dube needs no sighters. Flat length ball on the stumps; Dube gets down on one leg to nail the slogsweep. Dispatched over deep midwicket
118.6kph; Krunal bowls a bouncer outside off. Left alone by Shivam Dube
119.1kph; short again from Krunal and that's been dabbed through point

ball_event: out Caught by Abhinandan Singh!! Second wicket in the over for Krunal Pandya! 97.2kph
event_info: fullish ball; hint of spin as well. Kartik Sharma gets down to slogsweep and top-edges. Abhinandan; at short third man; circles under the ball; but manages to reverse-cup it. Kartik Sharma c Abhinandan Singh b Krunal Pandya 6(3) [6s-1]
126.1kph; bouncer outside off; Prashant Veer tries to ramp it towards third man and misses. 7 runs and two wickets off Krunal's opening over
142.3kph; yorker around off; Dube squeezes it to cover-point
to fine leg; dug in short; the line is just down leg and Prashant Veer swivels to pull it to fine leg. The man in the deep is too square
137.2kph; back of a length outside off; steered to third man
slower ball; full toss. Shivam Dube stays leg-side of the ball; waits for it and belts it just past the bowler. Bullets away to the fence
132.1kph; short of length; punched to mid-off
beaten on the outside edge! 140.8kph; fuller than a length; a mighty swing of the willow from Dube; doesn't connect
misfield and four! 118.1kph; short; quick and wide of off; Prashant Veer cuts to the left of backward point. Awkward bounce for Bhuvi who fails to stop it
90.5kph; length ball on the stumps; worked through midwicket for a single
118.4kph; bouncer outside off; Shivam Dube shoulders arms. The batter has a look at the square leg umpire; not a wide
low-arm release now from Krunal. Skids off the deck on a length and Shivam Dube slaps it down to long-off. He was looking to swing it across the line
90kph; normal fullish ball; Prashant Veer eases it through point
bumper from Krunal at 119.3kph; Dube goes after this one with a pull shot and the top-edge runs away to the boundary. Fine leg and third man were inside the crease
138.3kph; back of a length delivery; tucked to midwicket
137.6kph; almost in the blockhole; leg-lined; Dube clips it through midwicket
138.5kph; away-angling length ball outside off; guided to third man
shortened length from Abhinandan; Dube shapes to pull but toe-ends it to cover

ball_event: out Caught by Jitesh Sharma!! That's a stunning catch from Jitesh Sharma! 134kph
event_info: not that short to be pulling and all manages to get is an inside edge. The ball not only goes to the right of the keeper but it's also dying on him. Jitesh dives full-length to his right and snaffles a low catch with his right hand. A one-handed screamer. The umpires wanted to check if it carried. Clean as a whistle and CSK sink further. Shivam Dube c Jitesh Sharma b Abhinandan Singh 18(13) [4s-2 6s-1]
138.2kph; very full and on the stumps; Overton dinks it to long-on
googly; length ball on middle-leg; turned through square leg
93.5kph; leg-lined; Prashant Veer nurdles it to backward square leg
Overton goes on the back foot to cut/punch. Thick outside edge as the ball spins a bit . Beats the diving short third man fielder to his right
100.6kph; quicker one; stump-to-stump line; jabbed through midwicket
88.2kph; tossed up and fuller; Veer gets forward to defensively push it to backward point
89.7kph; flighted delivery; full in length; driven along the ground to long-off
over the wicket; length ball on the stumps; Prashant Veer punches to long-on
131kph; short of a good length; Overton stands tall and muscles the heave over wide long-on for an 83m six
back-to-back sixes for Overton! Slow; short and wide of off; Overton once again stands tall and flat-bats it over long-off
116.6kph; pace off delivery into the wicket; head-high; Overton gets a top-edge on his pull that goes over backward square leg. A couple of bounces and into the fence
131.5kph; pitched up delivery; driven firmly straight down the ground. Kohli sprints to his left from long-on and parries it to Patidar (long-off) to save three runs
short of length outside off; stabbed to deep extra cover
flighted googly; Prashant Veer spots it late and guides it to short third man
quicker one outside off; Prashant Veer tries to late-dab but gets beaten on the outside edge
93.3kph; fraction short; looked like the googly; Prashant Veer works it through midwicket off the back foot
backs away to cut to the left of deep backward point. Kohli hares across and is quick to release the ball; keeps the batters down to one
wrong 'un; defensively pushed to cover
short of length; the line is down leg and Suyash gets away with it. Prashant Veer looks to pull and inside-edges for a single to short fine leg
low-arm release from Krunal. Bowls it quick and wide of off on a length. Prashant Veer stays back and slashes hard to send it through the covers
that's a biggie! Length ball; the line is outside off. Prashant Veer clears his front leg and swings hard to bludgeon it over long-on for a towering six

wow! Fired full outside off; Prashant Veer shuffles across to probably try and sweep. But he changes his mind at the last second. Brings his wrists into play to powerfully whip it away through midwicket. The ball raced away to the fence
quick; flat and outside off; Prashant Veer tries to late-dab and gets beaten on the outside edge
gets some wood on this occasion. Low-arm; slides across the left-hander. Prashant Veer shapes to cut and the under-edge goes well fine of the short third man fielder

a quick bouncer from Krunal Pandya. Prashant Veer hurriedly ducks under it and loses his balance. The batter is out of his crease but as he gets low; he has the presence of mind to drop his left hand inside the crease. It was good glovework from Jitesh Sharma as well
worked through midwicket and the single brings up the fifty partnership
92.9kph; on a length and marginally outside off; punched to cover and Krunal fails to stop it cleanly
legbreak; Overton goes on the back foot to slap it to long-off
belted down the ground! Full and outside off; Prashant Veer leans across; bends his back leg and smashes it over the umpire who has to duck under it. That was struck really hard
appeal for lbw as Prashant Veer misses the sweep against this googly. Pitched outside leg
wrong 'un on a slightly shorter length; jabbed towards long-on. Just 8 runs off the over

ball_event: out Caught by Rajat Patidar!! Bhuvi comes back to break the partnership. 131.1kph
event_info: short of a good length; Prashant Veer looks to punch it through extra cover. Hits him high on the bat and hence the placement isn't spot-on. Rajat Patidar flies to his left in the cover region to take a fine two-handed catch. Prashant Veer c Rajat Patidar b Bhuvneshwar Kumar 43(29) [4s-6 6s-1]
in the air and safe! 130.4kph; Kamboj looks to flick from the crease and the leading edge falls between mid-off and cover
118.1kph; pace off with width on offer. Overton throws his arms at it to carve it over the covers
FOUR; 136.5kph; four more! Bhuvneshwar goes for the yorker. It's a touch too straight and Overton flicks it backward of square on the leg-side. Bhuvneshwar has overstepped as well
just a single off the free-hit! Yorker outside off; jammed to long-off
135.6kph; short of length on middle; clipped through midwicket
136.3kph; almost in the blockhole; Overton can't get under it and knocks it to long-on for a single

ball_event: out Caught by (sub)Jacob Bethell!! In the air and taken! Well deserved wicket for Suyash Sharma. 88kph
event_info: googly that spins in with a bit of extra bounce. Overton goes on the back foot to try and thump it downtown. Doesn't time it as well as he would have liked. More height than distance and Bethell takes a safe catch at long-off. Jamie Overton c (sub)Jacob Bethell b Suyash Sharma 37(16) [4s-4 6s-2]
a slip in place for the new batter. Suyash bowls a length ball at 88.8kph; Noor heaves it to long-on

dropped! 87.7kph; googly outside off; Anshul Kamboj wants to slog across the line and the ball balloons up off the edge. Abhinandan doesn't look comfortable under it; tries to reverse-cup it and makes a mess of it
pushed back to the bowler
wrong 'un; Noor Ahmad swings across the line and misses. The ball bounces over the middle-stump
pad-lined googly; Noor flicks and misses. Excellent performance from Suyash Sharma who finishes with 1/21
slow and very full; Anshul Kamboj jams it back at the bowler who lets the ball go through his palms
132kph; length ball; Noor clears his front leg to heave and inside-edges to short fine leg
knuckle ball from Bhuvneshwar Kumar. Noor spots it; clears the left leg and tonks it over long-on
slashes on seeing the width and slices it over point
136.1kph; hard length; Anshul Kamboj swings hard and splices it to long-off
wide bouncer; Noor tries to upper-cut and misses. It's outside the tramline

ball_event: out Caught by Virat Kohli!! Bhuvneshwar finishes his spell with a wicket. Slow and short outside off
event_info: Noor stands tall to pull and doesn't middle it. Kohli runs to his right from long-on and makes a pretty tough catch look easy. Bhuvneshwar applauds. Noor Ahmad c Virat Kohli b Bhuvneshwar Kumar 8(8) [6s-1]
length ball well outside off; Anshul Kamboj slashes and misses
118.2kph; slower ball bouncer; Anshul Kamboj pulls and top-edges it over the keeper
136.6kph; full delivery darted in; Kamboj flicks and misses to get hit on the pads. Missing leg and hence no lbw appeal
132.4kph; yorker; squeezed towards the mid-on region
129.3kph; short ball; Henry flat-bats it over the bowler
102.7kph; slower ball into the deck. Anshul Kamboj spots it early; waits for it and makes good contact with his pull shot to dispatch it over deep backward square leg
yorker; jammed down to long-on
136.6kph; low full toss; Anshul Kamboj clears his front leg and swings hard; outside-halves to cover
135.3kph; yorker length; jammed down to long-on
in the air and wide of the bowler. 134.2kph; hard length from Abhinandan; Kamboj swings across the line and splices it to the left of the bowler

ball_event: out Caught by Phil Salt!! RCB win by 43 runs! 111.2kph
event_info: slower ball on a length; Henry swings across the line to heave it over midwicket. Salt moves to his right; slides and completes a good catch. Matt Henry c Phil Salt b Abhinandan Singh 2(3)
